allow: Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) for r in data.get\('items', []\)[:20]: print\(f\\"Stars: {r['stargazers_count']} | {r['full_name']} | {r['html_url']}\\"\) print\(f\\" Desc: {r.get\('description','N/A'\)}\\"\) print\(f\\" Updated: {r['updated_at']} | Lang: {r.get\('language','N/A'\)}\\"\) print\(\) ")
